nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the inter-session communication layer for the ECC control plane, including TaskPriority and MessageType enums, message serialization, and helpers for previewing and routing messages between agent sessions.
nodes.languageNotes: Rust module barrel for the comms subsystem; exports enums and free functions for inter-agent messaging via serde_json.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Central configuration module for the ECC2 control plane, defining all runtime config structs (agent profiles, harness runners, orchestration templates, memory connectors, TUI layout), plus TOML loading, merging, and persistence logic.
nodes.languageNotes: Large Rust config module using serde/TOML with multi-level merging and template variable interpolation.

nodes.name: main.rs
nodes.summary: Main entry point and CLI command handler for the ECC2 control-plane binary; implements the full CLI surface (sessions, schedules, remote dispatch, worktrees, memory graph, migration, observability export) via clap subcommands.
nodes.languageNotes: Extremely large Rust binary crate root (~12K lines) combining CLI parsing, memory-graph sync, legacy migration, OTLP export, and coordination logic.

nodes.name: notifications.rs
nodes.summary: Implements desktop and webhook notification subsystems for ECC2, including quiet-hours filtering, notification throttling, webhook payload construction, and shell-command-based desktop notification delivery.
nodes.languageNotes: Self-contained Rust module with no intra-project imports; exports notification config structs and notifier implementations used by config and dashboard.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Provides the tool-call risk assessment engine and observability event types for ECC2, computing risk scores based on tool type, file sensitivity, blast radius, and irreversibility.
nodes.languageNotes: Rust module combining structured event types with a multi-factor risk scoring algorithm for Claude Code tool calls.

nodes.name: daemon.rs
nodes.summary: Implements the background daemon loop for ECC2 session lifecycle management, handling automatic session dispatch, heartbeat enforcement, worktree auto-merge/prune, conflict resolution, and crash recovery.
nodes.languageNotes: Rust async daemon that drives all background automation policies; uses testable recorder pattern for side-effect capture.

nodes.name: manager.rs
nodes.summary: Core session management layer for ECC2, providing session creation, scheduling, remote dispatch, orchestration template execution, budget enforcement, conflict resolution, worktree operations, and agent process spawning.
nodes.languageNotes: The largest single-responsibility module in the control plane (~8K lines); orchestrates all active session lifecycle operations over SQLite state.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Session module barrel that re-exports all session subsystems (daemon, manager, output, runtime, store) and defines core session domain types including SessionState, HarnessKind, RemoteDispatchRequest, and ContextObservationPriority.
nodes.languageNotes: Rust session module root combining pub use re-exports with rich domain-model type definitions for the entire session subsystem.

nodes.name: output.rs
nodes.summary: Provides in-memory session output buffering with OutputStream, OutputLine, and SessionOutputStore types, supporting real-time line accumulation and retrieval for TUI display.
nodes.languageNotes: Small but foundational Rust module providing the output buffer types consumed by both the daemon and TUI dashboard.

nodes.name: runtime.rs
nodes.summary: Implements async session runtime utilities including a DbWriter for background database persistence, command output capture, and stream processing for ECC2 session processes.
nodes.languageNotes: Rust async runtime module using tokio for concurrent DB write batching and stdout/stderr capture.

nodes.name: store.rs
nodes.summary: SQLite-backed state store for the ECC2 control plane, implementing the full persistence layer for sessions, messages, scheduled tasks, remote dispatch requests, worktrees, memory graph entities, tool logs, and conflict incidents.
nodes.languageNotes: Largest persistence module (~7K lines) using rusqlite; handles schema migrations, multi-table queries, context graph compaction, and board metadata derivation.

nodes.name: app.rs
nodes.summary: TUI application bootstrap for ECC2, initializing the terminal, launching the main dashboard render loop, and managing terminal cleanup on exit.
nodes.languageNotes: Rust ratatui TUI bootstrap; thin wrapper that sets up crossterm raw mode and hands control to the Dashboard.

nodes.name: dashboard.rs
nodes.summary: Full-featured terminal UI dashboard for the ECC2 control plane, implementing the complete interactive session monitor with multi-pane layout, session management actions, output streaming, git integration, context graph display, and notification delivery.
nodes.languageNotes: Extremely large Rust ratatui component (~15K lines) that is effectively the entire TUI application; owns all rendering, input handling, and background sync logic.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Minimal barrel module for the ECC2 TUI subsystem, re-exporting app, dashboard, and widgets sub-modules.
nodes.languageNotes: Three-line Rust mod.rs; purely structural, no logic.

nodes.name: widgets.rs
nodes.summary: Custom ratatui widget helpers for ECC2 TUI, providing budget state visualization, token/currency formatting, gradient color computation, and styled line components used across the dashboard.
nodes.languageNotes: Rust ratatui widget library with RGB gradient interpolation and a BudgetState enum driving color-coded budget indicators.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Git worktree management module for ECC2, implementing creation, removal, diff/status queries, patch application, hunk-level staging, commit/PR operations, merge readiness assessment, shared-dependency sync, and conflict detection.
nodes.languageNotes: Rust git worktree abstraction (~2.6K lines) using subprocess git invocations; covers the complete lifecycle from creation through merge and pruning.

nodes.name: Config
nodes.summary: Primary runtime configuration struct for ECC2, aggregating all subsystem settings and providing load, save, and resolution methods for agent profiles, orchestration templates, and harness runners.

nodes.name: PaneNavigationConfig
nodes.summary: Configures keyboard shortcuts for TUI pane navigation, mapping key bindings to focus and movement actions.

nodes.name: BudgetAlertThresholds
nodes.summary: Defines the three-tier budget alert threshold configuration (advisory, warning, critical) with sanitization logic.

nodes.name: Commands
nodes.summary: Top-level clap CLI command enum for the ECC2 binary, routing to session, message, schedule, remote, migration, and graph subcommands.

nodes.name: DesktopNotificationConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration struct for desktop notifications with enabled flag, quiet-hours, and allowed event-type filtering.

nodes.name: WebhookNotificationConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration and dispatch logic for webhook-based notifications, supporting multiple target URLs with event filtering and allow-rules.

nodes.name: DesktopNotifier
nodes.summary: Runtime notifier that checks quiet-hours and dispatches desktop notifications via system commands.

nodes.name: WebhookNotifier
nodes.summary: Runtime notifier that dispatches structured JSON payloads to configured webhook URLs over HTTP.

nodes.name: ToolCallEvent
nodes.summary: Structured event type capturing a tool call invocation with risk score, file paths, and metadata for observability and risk gate enforcement.

nodes.name: HarnessKind
nodes.summary: Enum identifying the AI agent harness type (ClaudeCode, Codex, OpenCode, etc.) for session management and process spawning.

nodes.name: SessionState
nodes.summary: State machine enum for session lifecycle (Pending, Running, Paused, Completed, Failed, etc.) with valid-transition guard logic.

nodes.name: RemoteDispatchRequest
nodes.summary: Represents a pending remote dispatch task request, including task description, target agent profile, and scheduling metadata.

nodes.name: SessionOutputStore
nodes.summary: In-memory output buffer mapping session IDs to their accumulated output lines for real-time TUI display.

nodes.name: OutputStream
nodes.summary: Ordered collection of output lines for a single session, supporting line appending and bounded retrieval.

nodes.name: DbWriter
nodes.summary: Async background writer that batches output-line persistence to the SQLite store, decoupling session output capture from synchronous DB writes.

nodes.name: StateStore
nodes.summary: Central SQLite-backed state store for all ECC2 persistent data, providing typed CRUD and query methods for sessions, messages, schedules, worktrees, context graph, and tool logs.

nodes.name: DaemonActivity
nodes.summary: Tracks daemon background-loop activity counters (dispatch, recovery, rebalance, merge, prune passes) for health monitoring.

nodes.name: Dashboard
nodes.summary: Main TUI application struct for ECC2, managing all interactive session monitor state including pane layout, selection, output cache, search, notifications, and background data sync.

nodes.name: Pane
nodes.summary: Enum of focusable TUI pane slots (Sessions, Output, Metrics, Log) with navigation and collapse logic.

nodes.name: SessionCompletionSummary
nodes.summary: Captures and summarizes a completed session's output, decisions, and warnings for popup display and webhook delivery.

nodes.name: BudgetState
nodes.summary: Enum representing budget consumption levels (Normal, Advisory, Warning, Critical) used to drive color-coded TUI budget indicators.

nodes.name: send
nodes.summary: Sends a typed inter-session message by serializing to JSON and writing to the state store.

nodes.name: preview
nodes.summary: Generates a human-readable preview string for a message, formatting task handoffs with priority, file counts, and truncated content.

nodes.name: load
nodes.summary: Loads ECC2 configuration from the default global and project-specific TOML paths, merging layered overrides.

nodes.name: resolve_orchestration_template
nodes.summary: Resolves a named orchestration template by name, interpolating variable substitutions in task strings and merging step-level overrides.

nodes.name: resolve_agent_profile
nodes.summary: Resolves an agent profile by name following the inheritance chain, returning a fully-merged ResolvedAgentProfile.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Async main entry point that parses CLI args, loads config, initializes the state store, and dispatches to the appropriate command handler.

nodes.name: run_coordination_loop
nodes.summary: Runs the background coordination polling loop, invoking the session daemon to process dispatch backlogs, heartbeats, and worktree automation.

nodes.name: sync_all_memory_connectors
nodes.summary: Synchronizes all configured memory connectors (JSONL, Markdown, dotenv) into the context graph, updating entity observations from external sources.

nodes.name: build_otel_export
nodes.summary: Builds an OpenTelemetry OTLP export payload from session records for external observability pipeline ingestion.

nodes.name: compute_risk
nodes.summary: Computes a composite risk score for a tool call by combining base tool risk, file sensitivity, blast radius, and irreversibility factors.

nodes.name: log
nodes.summary: Persists a tool call event to the state store for later query and risk enforcement.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Main daemon loop entry point that continuously polls the session manager for dispatch, heartbeat, rebalance, merge, and prune operations.

nodes.name: coordinate_backlog_cycle
nodes.summary: Executes one backlog coordination cycle, routing pending handoffs and dispatch requests to available sessions or spawning new ones.

nodes.name: create_session
nodes.summary: Creates and launches a new agent session by resolving the profile, provisioning a worktree if needed, and spawning the harness process.

nodes.name: launch_orchestration_template
nodes.summary: Launches a multi-step orchestration template by resolving variables and sequentially creating sessions for each step.

nodes.name: enforce_budget_hard_limits
nodes.summary: Checks all running sessions against their configured USD and token budgets, pausing or stopping those that have exceeded their limits.

nodes.name: merge_session_worktree
nodes.summary: Merges a completed session's git worktree back into the base branch and cleans up the worktree directory.

nodes.name: init_schema
nodes.summary: Initializes the SQLite database schema, creating all tables and indexes required for the ECC2 state store, and runs any pending migrations.

nodes.name: recall_context_entities
nodes.summary: Performs fuzzy term-based recall across the context graph, returning ranked entities matching the query terms.

nodes.name: compact_context_graph_observations
nodes.summary: Compacts the context graph by removing redundant or superseded observations, keeping the graph queryable and performant.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Bootstraps the TUI terminal session, enters raw mode, creates the dashboard, and runs the event loop until the user quits.

nodes.name: render
nodes.summary: Renders the complete dashboard frame by composing pane areas and dispatching to specialized render methods for sessions, output, metrics, and log panes.

nodes.name: tick
nodes.summary: Processes a single event-loop tick, polling the store for state changes, syncing metrics, and delivering notifications.

nodes.name: sync_from_store
nodes.summary: Pulls fresh session state, messages, worktree health, and context graph data from the state store into dashboard cache.

nodes.name: create_for_session_in_repo
nodes.summary: Creates a git worktree branch for a session in the given repository, setting up the isolated development environment.

nodes.name: merge_into_base
nodes.summary: Merges a worktree branch into the base branch using git, handling fast-forward and merge commit strategies.

nodes.name: merge_readiness
nodes.summary: Assesses whether a worktree branch is ready to be merged by checking for conflicts, divergence, and CI status.

nodes.name: health
nodes.summary: Returns the health status of a worktree, checking for git errors, unresolved conflicts, and staleness.
